betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Digamma Fuel§f

§aThe ultimate RBMK fuel — combining balefire with the digamma particle!§f

§bDigamma RBMK Fuel§f is crafted by combining a §bBalefire RBMK Fuel Rod§f with the §bDigamma Particle§f at a crafting table. This recipe is shapeless.

Recipe: Balefire RBMK Fuel Rod + The Digamma Particle → Digamma RBMK Fuel Rod

§6Properties§f:
§b• Extremely volatile — handle with extreme caution
§b• Produces §bDigamma Radiation§f when burned in an RBMK
§b• One of the most powerful RBMK fuels available

§6Post-Burn Recycling§f:
Spent digamma fuel rods can be processed in a §bSILEX§f to obtain §bUndefined§f, a mysterious material used for crafting the §bMurky Anvil§f and the §bDigamma Laser Crystal§f.

§cWarning§f: Digamma fuel produces digamma radiation when burned. This is the most dangerous radiation type in the mod and cannot be blocked by standard hazmat suits! Ensure your RBMK has adequate shielding and remote monitoring.

§eTip§f: Don't burn digamma fuel unless you have a plan for handling the waste and digamma radiation. The payoff is the Undefined material, which enables some of the most unique items in the mod.
